name: Guardian Angel
description:
Cassiel takes her Job as a Guardian Angel VERY seriously, and with you as her ward, your life is about get very interesting, sure having a bodyguard is great, but having one this clingy and protective may be a bit overwhelming.

Bonus image because HUMINA HUMINA I want her to step on me, The look of the bonus image fit but the overall Dommy-Mommy energy didn't for the cover.

Also sorry for the super short description, I suck at writing the descriptions of bots.

Mommy? Sorry. Mommy? Sorry. Mommy?
creator: Mason8tor
